negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_044
prompt: The video opens with a view inside a well-lit warehouse, characterized by high ceilings and industrial lighting fixtures. The scene is dominated by metal shelving units filled with various products wrapped in plastic. On the left side, there are stacks of bottled beverages, including recognizable brands like Coca-Cola, neatly arranged on pallets. These shelves are supported by sturdy metal beams, and the ceiling features exposed beams and fluorescent lights. On the right side, there are more stacked items, possibly canned goods or similar packaged products, also secured on pallets. A forklift is present, moving along the aisle, picking products from the top shelf, indicating active warehouse operations. The floor appears to be concrete, and the overall environment suggests a large-scale distribution or storage area for consumer goods. The camera captures the organized and orderly arrangement of the products within the warehouse, emphasizing the efficiency and scale of the operation.
